data.content: MSTest 4.x renamed `ThrowsException` → `Assert.ThrowsExactly`. Let me fix that.
data.reasoningText: MSTest v4 uses `Assert.ThrowsExactly` instead of `Assert.ThrowsException`. Let me check the MSTest version API.

data.content: All 11 tests pass. Now let me do a systematic mutation analysis — I'll introduce specific small mutations one at a time and check whether any test catches them.

arguments.command:
cd /tmp/sv-c490ee294edb4e74afc03c6b4824c27f && cp PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig

# Script to test mutations one at a time
run_mutation() {
  local desc="$1"
  local sed_cmd="$2"
  cp PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs
  eval "sed -i '$sed_cmd' PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs"
  result=$(dotnet test PricingEngine.Tests/PricingEngine.Tests.csproj --no-restore -q 2>&1 | tail -1)
  if echo "$result" | grep -q "Failed:     0"; then
    echo "SURVIVED  | $desc"
  else
    echo "KILLED    | $desc"
  fi
}

echo "=== CalculateDiscount mutations ==="
run_mutation ">= 1000 → > 1000 (off-by-one at top tier)" 's/>= 1000m/> 1000m/'
run_mutation ">= 500 → > 500 (off-by-one at mid tier)" 's/>= 500m/> 500m/'
run_mutation ">= 100 → > 100 (off-by-one at low tier)" 's/>= 100m/> 100m/'
run_mutation "0.15m → 0.14m (wrong discount rate)" 's/0\.15m/0.14m/'
run_mutation "0.10m → 0.11m (wrong mid discount)" 's/orderTotal \* 0\.10m/orderTotal * 0.11m/'
run_mutation "0.05m → 0.04m (wrong low discount)" 's/0\.05m/0.04m/'
run_mutation "< 0 → <= 0 (zero becomes invalid)" 's/orderTotal < 0/orderTotal <= 0/'

echo ""
echo "=== CalculateShipping mutations ==="
run_mutation "> 250 → >= 250 (free shipping boundary)" 's/> 250m/>= 250m/'
run_mutation "> 250 → > 251 (shift free shipping threshold)" 's/> 250m/> 251m/'
run_mutation "> 10.0 → >= 10.0 (heavy item boundary)" 's/> 10\.0/>= 10.0/'
run_mutation "> 10.0 → > 11.0 (shift heavy threshold)" 's/> 10\.0/> 11.0/'
run_mutation "1.50m → 1.25m (wrong express surcharge)" 's/1\.50m/1.25m/'
run_mutation "15.00m → 10.00m (wrong heavy fee)" 's/15\.00m/10.00m/'
run_mutation "remove express surcharge entirely" 's/if (express)/if (false)/'
run_mutation "5.00m base → 6.00m (wrong base cost)" 's/5\.00m + /6.00m + /'

echo ""
echo "=== ApplyCoupon mutations ==="
run_mutation "SAVE20 never tested (change rate)" 's/total \* 0\.20m/total * 0.25m/'
run_mutation "FLAT5 never tested (change amount)" 's/\"FLAT5\" => 5\.00m/\"FLAT5\" => 10.00m/'
run_mutation "< 1.00m → < 0.00m (floor check broken)" 's/result < 1\.00m/result < 0.00m/'
run_mutation "return 1.00m → return 0.00m (floor value)" 's/? 1\.00m/? 0.00m/'
run_mutation "unknown coupon: 0m → 5m (free discount)" 's/_ => 0m/_ => 5m/'

# Restore original
cp PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs
rm PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig

cd /tmp/sv-c490ee294edb4e74afc03c6b4824c27f && cp PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig

echo "=== ApplyCoupon mutations ==="

run_mutation "FLAT5 never tested (change amount)" 's/\"FLAT5\" => 5\.00m/\"FLAT5\" => 10.00m/'
run_mutation "< 1.00m → < 0.00m (floor check broken)" 's/result < 1\.00m/result < 0.00m/'
run_mutation "return 1.00m → return 0.00m (floor value)" 's/? 1\.00m/? 0.00m/'
run_mutation "unknown coupon: 0m → 5m (free discount)" 's/_ => 0m/_ => 5m/'

# Restore original
cp PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs
rm PricingEngine/DiscountCalculator.cs.orig", "description": "Run mutation testing script", "initial_wait": 120}
